device_name: Brainlab Elements  Trajectory Planning (2.6), Elements Stereotaxy, Elements Lead Localization, Elements Trajectory Planning Cranial
intended_use: Brainlab Elements - Trajectory Planning software is intended for pre-, intra- and postoperative image-based planning and review of either open or minimally invasive neurosurgical and neurological proc
intended_use_full: Brainlab Elements - Trajectory Planning software is intended for pre-, intra- and postoperative image-based planning and review of either open or minimally invasive neurosurgical and neurological procedures. Its use is indicated for any medical condition in which the use of stereotactic surgery may be appropriate for the placement of instruments/devices and where the position of the instrument/device can be identified relative to images of the anatomy.
target_condition: Any medical condition appropriate for stereotactic neurosurgery, including: catheter placement, depth electrode placement (SEEG), DBS lead placement, probe placement, and cranial biopsies
ground_truth: WayPoint Planner Software (for anchor detection comparison); predicate device specifications (for functional comparison)
other_metrics: FHC anchor detection algorithm accuracy and robustness for 4mm and 5mm bone anchors reported as non-inferior to WayPoint Planner Software; acceptance criteria from test plan fulfilled
